use_case: FB-B-03 (deferred) / S9 — the future intake-confirm fan-out targets W1's `allergy` write, which is in the V1 supported-targets enum. Pinning this no-op here ensures a future regression that quietly removes 'allergy' from `V1_WRITE_TARGETS` would surface as a case failure rather than silently degrading the intake-card persistence path.
